Welcome to Kids Kraze

The Ultimate Indoor Adventure Awaits!

A world of fun, laughter and memories — Kids Kraze is Chishtian's brightest indoor playland, built for little explorers to climb, slide, bounce and race in a safe, supervised space while parents relax nearby.

From the ball pit to the rope course, every corner is designed to keep kids moving, giggling and coming back for more.

8+Attractions & rides
3–12Perfect age range
100%Safe & clean
Non-Stop Fun

Exciting Rides & Attractions

Everything a kid could ask for, all under one colourful roof.

Ball Pit

Dive into a sea of colourful balls.

Slides

Twisty, speedy, endlessly fun.

Climbing Wall

Grip, reach and reach the top.

Bumper Cars

Zoom, bump and giggle away.

Trampoline

Bounce as high as you dare.

Rope Course

Crawl, balance and conquer.

Punching Bag

Burn energy the fun way.

Arcade Games

Classic games for every player.

Celebrate With Us

Perfect for Parties & Events

Birthdays, get-togethers and school trips — we handle the fun, you make the memories.

Let's throw the best party ever!

  • Dedicated party area & seating
  • Balloon decoration & theming
  • Mascot meet & greet — Bunny & Tiger
  • Full access to all rides & play zones
  • Custom food & party packages

Play & Eat

Let's Play & Eat Together

All that playing works up an appetite! Refuel at our in-house café with tasty snacks, fresh juices and kid-friendly meals — so the whole family can relax and enjoy the day.
